svg.title: AIMO3 Hard-Math Accuracy
svg.desc: Accuracy on a 10-task AIMO3 hard-math subset for DeepSeek V4 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and Gemma 4 31B IT Nitro.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: A small stress test: single-turn, multi-turn, and local Python-tool variants.
